name: Public Data Assigned to Private Array-Typed Field
description: Public data is assigned directly to a private array-typed field without creating a defensive copy, which is equivalent to giving public access to the array. External code retaining the original reference can modify the private field's contents, breaking encapsulation.
detection_pattern: INGRESS(public_parameter) assigned directly to STORAGE(private_array_field) without TRANSFORM(defensive_copy). Look for method parameters or external data being stored in private fields by direct reference assignment.
